channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Study shows strong results for new weight-loss injections among Indian patients
item.description: A recent study conducted at Max Super Speciality Hospital in Delhi has revealed promising outcomes for India’s growing use of modern weight-loss injections. Led by endocrinologist Dr Ambrish Mithal, t...

item.title: Starmer stresses NATO’s importance for US and Europe during Gulf visit

item.title: NASA Artemis II astronauts safely return to Earth after Moon mission
item.description: NASA don successfully land four astronauts—Christina Koch, Victor Glover, Jeremy Hansen, and Reid Wiseman—back for Earth for Pacific Ocean as dem complete their lunar fly-by mission. After splashdown,...

item.title: Suspect in QR Code Scam Targeting Sibuyan Island Stores Arrested at Romblon Port
item.description: Authorities in Romblon arrested a man implicated in a QR code scam affecting several stores on Sibuyan Island. The suspect reportedly went from store to store requesting cash-in transactions using an ...

item.title: Kenya’s Graduates Face Job Market Challenges Due to University Strikes
item.description: In Kenya, repeated strikes at public universities are seriously affecting students’ academic timelines and future job prospects. Normally, a Kenyan student would finish university around age 22 or 23,...

item.description: US President Donald Trump has unveiled plans for a grand triumphal arch to be built in Washington DC, intended to rival some of the world’s most iconic monuments. According to a 12-page plan released ...

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II crew completes first lunar flight in over 50 years
